title: glandularia quadrangulata
intro: Glandularia quadrangulata, also known as Four-angled Verbena, is a flowering plant native to North and South America, characterized by its clusters of small white or pink flowers and quadrangular stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Glandularia quadrangulata include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Glandularia quadrangulata are typically made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's extract in tinctures and capsules.
